name: Hot Cross Buns # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, cream of tartar, spices, and sugar into a bowl.
2. Cut in butter until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Stir in fruits.
4. Gradually stir in milk until combined.
5. Turn dough out onto a floured board.
6. Pat dough smoothly to a thickness of 7/8 inch.
7. Using a 3-inch cutter, cut out buns and place them on a baking sheet.
8. Press the back of a knife to make a cross on top of each bun.
9. In a small bowl, mix 2 teaspoons sugar with 1 1/2 teaspoons milk.
10. Brush the tops of each bun with the sugar mixture.
11. Bake at 425°F for 12 minutes. Makes 10 to 12 buns.
